'''ladhoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocodazol|nocodazol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocodazol|nocodazol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ladhoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædheheth|lædheheth]] || [[word:lædhehej|lædhehej]] || [[word:lædhehesh|lædhehesh]] || [[word:lædhehe|lædhehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhodhohoth|ladhodhohoth]] || [[word:ladhodhohoj|ladhodhohoj]] || [[word:ladhodhohosh|ladhodhohosh]] || [[word:ladhodhoho|ladhodhoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhohoth|ladhohoth]] || [[word:ladhohoj|ladhohoj]] || [[word:ladhohosh|ladhohosh]] || [[word:ladhoho|ladhoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhofhoth|ladhofhoth]] || [[word:ladhofhoj|ladhofhoj]] || [[word:ladhofhosh|ladhofhosh]] || [[word:ladhofhof|ladhofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladhohotho|ladhohotho]] || [[word:ladhohojo|ladhohojo]] || [[word:ladhohosho|ladhohosho]] || [[word:ladhohoko|ladhohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladhohoth|ladhohoth]] || [[word:ladhohoj|ladhohoj]] || [[word:ladhohosh|ladhohosh]] || [[word:ladhoho|ladhoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladhohothol|ladhohothol]] || [[word:ladhohojol|ladhohojol]] || [[word:ladhohoshol|ladhohoshol]] || [[word:ladhohokol|ladhohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladhohothotho|ladhohothotho]] || [[word:ladhohojojo|ladhohojojo]] || [[word:ladhohoshosho|ladhohoshosho]] || [[word:ladhohoko|ladhohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladhohothon|ladhohothon]] || [[word:ladhohojon|ladhohojon]] || [[word:ladhohoshon|ladhohoshon]] || [[word:ladhohokon|ladhohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladhohothoro|ladhohothoro]] || [[word:ladhohojoro|ladhohojoro]] || [[word:ladhohoshoro|ladhohoshoro]] || [[word:ladhohokoro|ladhohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
